summary: Completed comprehensive testing of CloudDoctor AI-powered cloud diagnostics application. Backend APIs fully functional, frontend navigation and core features working with minor UI interaction issues.

ui_bugs.issue: Trigger Incident button remains disabled after scenario selection
ui_bugs.description: Button state management issue - button doesn't enable properly after selecting scenario from dropdown

ui_bugs.issue: Status filter dropdown selector not found with expected testid
ui_bugs.description: Test selector may be incorrect or component structure changed

passed_tests: All 13 backend API endpoints working correctly
Health status pills showing correct service states
Navigation between all 4 pages (Dashboard, Log Analyzer, AI Diagnosis, Reports)
Log Analyzer severity filter chips and streaming toggle
Reports page incident table with 2 existing incidents
Real-time log streaming with proper formatting
MongoDB, LLM, and Sample App health monitoring
action_item_for_main_agent: Fix Trigger Incident button state management - button should enable when scenario is selected. The backend incident creation API works correctly, but the frontend button remains disabled after scenario selection.
